ogTitle: Horsnell Gully vs Hoskin Corner: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Horsnell Gully and Hoskin Corner.
heading: Horsnell Gully vs Hoskin Corner — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Horsnell Gully, South Australia and Hoskin Corner, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Horsnell Gully has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hoskin Corner (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Horsnell Gully or Hoskin Corner safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Horsnell Gully has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Hoskin Corner scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Horsnell Gully scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Hoskin Corner scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Horsnell Gully or Hoskin Corner?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Horsnell Gully has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
